svg.title: Linkual Log Deployment Architecture
svg.desc: Deployment-oriented architecture diagram for Linkual Log, centered on a lightweight cloud server physical instance with Nginx, Docker Compose services, JSON data volumes, client entrypoints, external LLM API, Git, and Zensical static website generation.

g.text: Nginx + Docker Compose + JSON 数据卷
公网域名 / HTTPS / 端口转发
词库 / 精修 / 复习
事件推送 / 消息回复
